title: eriogonum tumulosum
intro: Eriogonum tumulosum, also known as mountain buckwheat, is a perennial shrub native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eriogonum tumulosum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
